message:
feat(cancellation): add operational telemetry counters to ShutdownCoordinator [ft-3kxe.25]

Add ShutdownCoordinatorTelemetry with 9 counters tracking scope registration,
shutdown requests, cascades, escalations, finalizer lifecycle, and shutdown
completions. Wire all counter increments into existing methods. Add 17 tests
(12 unit + 5 property) validating counter accuracy, monotonicity, and serde
roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
